name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Colorado Springs, CO's Superb Cash Advance at 3957 N Academy Blvd offers quick payday and title loans Mon–Fri until 8:30 PM.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance's Colorado Springs location at 3957 N Academy Blvd, Suite 7, operates on Academy Boulevard in north-central Colorado Springs. The store is open Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, with shorter Saturday and Sunday hours (9:30 AM–6:30 PM) for weekend visitors in the CO area.

At this Colorado Springs location, Superb Cash Advance provides payday loans and title loans for residents needing quick cash. Call (719) 767-7821 to speak with a representative about loan amounts, terms, and the documentation you'll need to apply.

If you need same-day or next-day funding in Colorado Springs, bring your ID, proof of income, and banking information when you visit. Superb Cash Advance's Academy Boulevard location serves the surrounding neighborhoods and can close loans quickly for qualified borrowers.
address: 3957 N Academy Blvd #7, Colorado Springs, CO 80917

company_info.headquarters: 3957 N Academy Blvd #7, Colorado Springs, CO 80917

pros: Same-day cash disbursement available for approved applicants
Accepts all credit types with no hard credit check requirement
Loan amounts up to $5,000 available online and up to $50,000 for bad credit loans
Flexible payment schedules customized to individual budget constraints
Extended business hours (8:30am-8:30pm weekdays) for working customers
Minimal documentation and quick approval process reported by customers
In-person service at physical Atlanta location with friendly staff
Unsecured loans—no collateral required for most products
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on website—critical transparency gap
Typical payday loan structure suggests high cost of borrowing despite marketing language
Customer reviews mention Arvada locations, creating confusion about actual service locations and potential franchise/aggregation issues
No information on loan term lengths, rollover policies, or default consequences
No discernible regulatory compliance information, licenses, or consumer protections outlined
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing emergency cash within 24 hours
Borrowers seeking quick approval with minimal documentation and in-person service
Individuals who prefer local, face-to-face lending relationships over purely online lenders
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for borrowers with poor credit who need emergency cash within 24 hours and prefer in-person service. Critical caveat: the company discloses no interest rates, APRs, or fees on their website, which is atypical and concerning for a high-cost lender; all pricing and term details must be obtained directly before committing, and borrowers should compare rates with payday-alternative products (credit union PALs, CDFIs) that cap APR at 36%.
services: In-person loan processing at physical location
Second lien title loans (mentioned in reviews)
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 3957 N Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO. Quick payday and title loans, open Mon–Fri until 8:30 PM.
